allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object {$_LocalPort -in @\(3000,3001,8000,8001,8080,5000,5173,4173\)} | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,@{N=''PID'';E={$_OwningProcess}},@{N=''Name'';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}} | Format-Table -AutoSize")
